# Greener Grass Irrigation Repair

Irrigation repair company in Fort Worth, TX specializing in sprinkler system repair, installation, winterization, backflow testing, and smart controller upgrades for residential and commercial properties across Tarrant County.

## Business Information
- Legal Name: Greener Grass Irrigation Repair, LLC
- Phone: (817) 555-0100
- Email: info@greenergrass.com
- Address: 1234 Sprinkler Way, Fort Worth, TX 76102
- Hours: Monday–Friday 7:00 AM–6:00 PM, Saturday 8:00 AM–4:00 PM, Sunday Closed
- Service Area: Fort Worth, Arlington, Keller, Southlake, Colleyville, Grapevine, North Richland Hills, Hurst, Euless, Bedford, Mansfield, Burleson (Tarrant County, TX)
- Licensed: Yes — Texas TCEQ Irrigator License LI-XXXXXX
- Insured: Yes — full liability coverage
- Founded: 2011
- Years in Business: 14+
- Jobs Completed: 2,400+
- Google Rating: 4.9 stars (127 reviews)
- Tagline: Repair It Right. Keep It Green.

## Services
- Irrigation System Repair — same-day diagnosis and repair of valves, controllers, pipes, and heads
- Sprinkler Head Replacement — pop-up, rotary, and MP rotator head replacement for even lawn coverage
- System Installation — complete in-ground irrigation system design and installation
- Winterization & Blowout — compressed-air purge to protect systems from North Texas freeze damage
- Spring System Startup — full spring inspection, zone testing, and controller programming
- Backflow Testing & Repair — TCEQ-licensed annual backflow preventer testing and city-filed reports
- Drip Irrigation — water-efficient drip system design and installation for beds, shrubs, and gardens
- Smart Controller Upgrades — Rachio 3, Hunter Hydrawise, Rain Bird WiFi installation and programming
- Leak Detection & Repair — underground irrigation leak location and repair using pressure and acoustic testing

## About
Greener Grass Irrigation Repair, LLC is a licensed and insured irrigation company based in Fort Worth, TX, serving the greater Tarrant County area since 2011. The company specializes in irrigation system repair, sprinkler installation, winterization, backflow testing, and smart controller upgrades for residential and commercial properties. With 2,400+ jobs completed and a 4.9-star Google rating from 127 reviews, Greener Grass is one of North Texas's most trusted irrigation contractors.
